creator: sharadcse@yahoo.com
text:
While making in /usr/ports/devel/distcc, it reports 


gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/devel/gconf2/work/GConf-2.14.0/examples'
if cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -I.. -I.. -DORBIT2=1 -D_REENTRANT -DXTHREADS -DXUSE_MTSAFE_API -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/orbit-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/atk-1.0 -I/usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0 -I/usr/X11R6/lib/gtk-2.0/include -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/pango-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include   -DGCONF_SRCDIR=\""/usr/ports/devel/gconf2/work/GConf-2.14.0"\" -DGCONF_SYSCONFDIR=\""/usr/X11R6/etc/gconf"\"  -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -Wall -MT basic-gconf-app.o -MD -MP -MF ".deps/basic-gconf-app.Tpo" \
  -c -o basic-gconf-app.o `test -f 'basic-gconf-app.c' || echo './'`basic-gconf-app.c; \
then mv -f ".deps/basic-gconf-app.Tpo" ".deps/basic-gconf-app.Po"; \
else rm -f ".deps/basic-gconf-app.Tpo"; exit 1; \
fi
In file included from /usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gtk/gtk.h:152,
                 from basic-gconf-app.c:86:
/usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gtk/gtkstatusbar.h:68: error: syntax error before "GMemChunk"
gmake[2]: *** [basic-gconf-app.o] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/gconf2/work/GConf-2.14.0/examples'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/gconf2/work/GConf-2.14.0'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/gconf2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/distcc.
